B.A.L.L.E.R. Life
Meet TElaine

Nurse. Executive.
Transformation Coach.

I'm Twanna — TElaine — a BSN-turned-MBA, revenue strategist by day and transformation coach by calling. With over two decades navigating healthcare leadership, I know what it feels like to be built for more but stuck in the same place.

The Baller Life Collective was born from that tension — a space where faith-driven women get the tools, the truth, and the strategy to break every barrier holding them back and build the life God actually called them to.

B.A.L.L.E.R. isn't a vibe. It's a standard. Break All Life Limits Everyday Responsibly.

Free Resource

Stop Making These Mistakes

You're working hard at your 9–5, pouring into everyone else — and your 5–9 dream is still sitting on the back burner. This free guide shows you exactly what's getting in the way and how to fix it.

  • The 5 biggest mistakes keeping you stuck
  • Why your evenings feel unproductive (and how to fix it)
  • A simple way to start making real progress in your 5–9 hours

Stop consuming and start building.
Download now and take control of your 5–9.
